global_rules.philosophy: A minimalist, editorial digital notebook. Zero AI-slop gradients. High structural contrast using generous whitespace and 1px borders.
anti_patterns: No top navigation bar allowed. Sidebar only.
No centered text alignments by default (use left-aligned for editorial rigor).

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-black
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-black/60

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Fixed width w-64, h-screen, border-r border-black/10. Mobile: hidden behind hamburger menu, or sheet modal.
spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Use p-12 for the worksheet view to feel like A4 paper.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align primarily. Symmetrical balance through whitespace.

surfaces_and_components.cards: bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-xl shadow-none transition-colors hover:border-black/30

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-black/20 text-black rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-black/5 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-black/70 hover:text-black hover:bg-black/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

surfaces_and_components.inputs: rounded-lg border border-black/10 bg-white px-4 py-2.5 text-black placeholder:text-black/40 focus:border-black focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black

chat_bubbles.user: bg-black text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[85%]
chat_bubbles.ai: bg-white border border-black/10 text-black rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[85%]

surfaces_and_components.worksheet_paper: bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-none md:rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] p-8 md:p-16 max-w-4xl mx-auto my-8
surfaces_and_components.radius: General UI (buttons, inputs) uses rounded-lg. Cards use rounded-xl. Worksheet uses rounded-sm (paper aesthetic).

motion.hover: Subtle background shifts (bg-black/5) or border darkening. Instant or 150ms ease.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward motion (translate-y-2 opacity-0 to translate-y-0 opacity-100).
motion.microinteractions: Buttons scale down slightly (scale-95) on active. No bouncy physics.

empty_state_subjects.description: Minimalist 3D clay style illustration of a single book and a pencil, pure white and black, for Subjects empty state.

empty_state_chat.description: Minimalist editorial line art illustration of an empty desk with a single notebook, for Chat empty state.

empty_state_worksheet.description: Minimalist abstract illustration of floating paper sheets, completely black and white, for Worksheet generation empty state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts URL for Fraunces into index.html and apply to tailwind.config.js for BOTH sans and serif.
Do not build a top header. The layout must use a persistent left sidebar on desktop and a mobile-drawer sidebar on mobile.
For the 'Worksheet Viewer', create a literal 'paper' wrapper container inside the app. Add PDF export via a print stylesheet or html2canvas/jspdf.
Keep Shadcn components minimal. Strip out default shadow classes and replace with border-black/10.
Ensure the Fraunces font is actually legible at small sizes by using font-light or font-medium and slightly elevated line-height.
